title: DevLearn Platform
shortDescription: Interactive web development course platform with progress tracking.
fullDescription: A learning management system built for web development courses. Features include structured course modules, video embedding, code sandboxes, progress persistence, and a clean reading-optimized UI. Used to deliver HTML/CSS/JavaScript course content.
problem: Existing platforms like Udemy lack the flexibility for custom interactive exercises and code challenges tied to specific lesson content.
solution: A custom LMS with MDX-powered lesson content, embedded code sandboxes, and a progress tracker stored in the database per user.
impact: TODO: e.g. Delivered a full HTML/CSS/JS curriculum
TODO: e.g. Used by N students / learners
